C

clear() - 类中的静态方法 com.example.syntaxappproject.ImageCacheManager
Clears both the bitmap and Base64 caches.
clearFilters() - 类中的方法 com.example.syntaxappproject.EventFilterViewModel
Clear the filter, set all data to default.
com.example.syntaxappproject - 程序包 com.example.syntaxappproject
 
com.example.syntaxappproject.ui - 程序包 com.example.syntaxappproject.ui
 
Comment - com.example.syntaxappproject中的类
Model class representing a comment on an event in the SyntaxEvents application.
Comment() - 类的构造器 com.example.syntaxappproject.Comment
Required no-argument constructor for Firestore deserialization.
Comment(String, String, String, String, String) - 类的构造器 com.example.syntaxappproject.Comment
Constructs a new comment with the specified data.
CommentAdapter - com.example.syntaxappproject中的类
RecyclerView adapter for displaying comments in the event detail screen.
CommentAdapter(String, boolean, boolean, CommentAdapter.OnCommentDeleteListener, CommentAdapter.OnCommentReportListener) - 类的构造器 com.example.syntaxappproject.CommentAdapter
Constructs a new CommentAdapter with the specified parameters.
CommentAdapter.OnCommentDeleteListener - com.example.syntaxappproject中的接口
Callback interface for comment deletion events.
CommentAdapter.OnCommentReportListener - com.example.syntaxappproject中的接口
Callback interface for comment report events.
CommentRepository - com.example.syntaxappproject中的类
Repository class for handling comment operations in Firestore.
CommentRepository() - 类的构造器 com.example.syntaxappproject.CommentRepository
Constructs a new CommentRepository and initializes Firestore.
CommentRepository.CommentsCallback - com.example.syntaxappproject中的接口
Callback interface for operations that return a list of comments.
CommentRepository.RepositoryCallback - com.example.syntaxappproject中的接口
Callback interface for simple repository operations (add, delete, report).
CoOrganizerRepository - com.example.syntaxappproject中的类
Repository class responsible for check and add co-organizer
CoOrganizerRepository() - 类的构造器 com.example.syntaxappproject.CoOrganizerRepository
Constructs an EventJoinRepository and initializes the Firestore instance.
CoOrganizerRepository(boolean) - 类的构造器 com.example.syntaxappproject.CoOrganizerRepository
Protected constructor for unit testing.
CoOrganizerRepository.addCallback - com.example.syntaxappproject中的接口
Callback interface for add operation results.
CoOrganizerRepository.checkCallback - com.example.syntaxappproject中的接口
Callback interface for co-organizer check results.
CoOrganizerRepository.searchCallback - com.example.syntaxappproject中的接口
Callback interface for search entrants results.
createCSV(List<Pair<String, String>>) - 类中的静态方法 com.example.syntaxappproject.CSVService
Creates a StringBuilder containing CSV-formatted data from a list of pairs.
createProfile(String, Profile, ProfileRepository.RepositoryCallback) - 类中的方法 com.example.syntaxappproject.ProfileRepository
Creates a new profile document in Firestore for the given UID.
CSVService - com.example.syntaxappproject中的类
Service class for creating and storing CSV files.
CSVService() - 类的构造器 com.example.syntaxappproject.CSVService
